com.newland.nsdk.core.api.external.card.contact

Interface ExtCPUContactCard

  • All Superinterfaces:
    Card, ExtContactCard

    public interface ExtCPUContactCard
extends ExtContactCard
    Provides the ability to communicate with CPU card.

    How to create a ExtCPUContactCard instance:

         // Contact card slot is required.
     // Note:
     // - For IC1 slot, you need to open card reader and wait the card to be inserted before you create the card instance.
     // - For SAM slot, card instance could be created directly.
     ExtCPUContactCard extCPUContactCard1 = new ExtCPUContactCardImpl(ContactCardSlot.IC1)
     ExtCPUContactCard extCPUContactCard2 = new ExtCPUContactCardImpl(ContactCardSlot.SAM1)

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods Deprecated Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      ExtAPDUOutput performAPDU(Key key, AlgorithmParameters algorithmParameters, byte[] command)
      Deprecated.  
      ExtAPDUOutput performAPDU(Key key, AlgorithmParameters algorithmParameters, int actualLen, byte[] command)
      Performs APDU command after the card is activated.

      • Methods inherited from interface com.newland.nsdk.core.api.external.card.contact.ExtContactCard

        powerDown, powerUp

    • Method Detail

      • performAPDU

        ExtAPDUOutput performAPDU(Key key,
                          AlgorithmParameters algorithmParameters,
                          byte[] command)
                   throws NSDKException
        Deprecated. 
        Performs APDU command after the card is activated.
        Parameters:
        key - [Required] Key used to encrypt the command data.
        • Set it to null or set key ID to 0 when the command data is clear.
        • When the command data is encrypted, the following are required:
          • Key index
          • Key type, default value is KeyType.DES
        algorithmParameters - [Optional] Algorithm parameters, see AlgorithmParameters.
        • Default cipher mode: CipherMode.ECB
        • IV is required when cipher mode is CipherMode.CBC
        command - [Required] Encrypted or clear APDU command data.
        Returns:
        Encrypted APDU response data.
        Throws:
        NSDKException

      • performAPDU

        ExtAPDUOutput performAPDU(Key key,
                          AlgorithmParameters algorithmParameters,
                          int actualLen,
                          byte[] command)
                   throws NSDKException
        Performs APDU command after the card is activated.
        Parameters:
        key - [Required] Key used to encrypt the command data.
        • Set it to null or set key ID to 0 when the command data is clear.
        • When the command data is encrypted, the following are required:
          • Key index
          • Key type, default value is KeyType.DES
        algorithmParameters - [Optional] Algorithm parameters, see AlgorithmParameters.
        • Default cipher mode: CipherMode.ECB
        • IV is required when cipher mode is CipherMode.CBC
        actualLen - [Required] The length of actual command data (without padding)
        command - [Required] Encrypted or clear APDU command data.
        Returns:
        Encrypted APDU response data.
        Throws:
        NSDKException
